title: Leaf Decay
description: Leaves show when they decay after cutting down trees, with a texture consistent with leaf litter. Also obtainable with the debug stick.
body:
![About](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19d332cdab77737cd016fd7c1ae13efef260cbc7_0.webp)

**Leaf Decay** visually shows when leaves are decaying by applying a dead leaf texture, consistent with leaf litter. The texture appears once its blockstate reaches distance 7, which occurs after a tree is cut down. Adds 10 new leaf types that you can build with in creative, obtainable with the debug stick.
